docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP,LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOT, MICHAEL L A/K/A MICHAEL ELLIOT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP,LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP,LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLIOT, MICHAEL L A/K/A MICHAEL ELLIOT $5,036.89 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,261.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
